claim_bullets.bullet_text: Sometimes there are items from the ancient kingdom period that have this [Seal Enchantment] (raw/Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf p.68-82).
Golems in a state without commands are extremely rarely found, but might be found in the ruins of the ancient kingdom (raw/Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf p.68-82).
The final score of commands given during the ancient kingdom period is very high; a final score of at least 30 might be required (raw/Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf p.68-82).

source_record_text: Summary of Ancient Magic List part 3, covering spells from the ancient kingdom period, including Seal Enchantment and other magic.
